title: Ad Astra Recipes
description: Simple Data Pack which adds recipes for Ad Astra with Create Mod Compat:D
body:
My first datapack, lol:D
### What is this datapack for?
- Making things which vanilla Ad Astra doesn`t have and adding to this Create mod compat:D
- I don't know if there will be more updates, i just have no ideas now

Description and another text things can include mistaces, bc i'm still learning Eng:D
